data.summary: Payment issue in app: order status is 'Awaiting Payment'. Client needs help urgently.
key_points: Payment completed but order status is still 'Awaiting Payment'
Potential loss of tickets if not resolved soon
data.final_answer: I understand your concern. I will escalate this issue immediately to resolve the payment problem as quickly as possible.

data.summary: Client praises support team for quick response and assistance.
key_points: Prompt response in the middle of night
data.final_answer: Thank you for your kind words. Your satisfaction means a lot to us.

data.summary: Client inquires about QA engineer vacancies.
key_points: Client has completed courses and knows basic SQL.
Client is familiar with writing basic test cases.
Client is interested in a junior position or part-time work.
data.final_answer: We appreciate your interest. Our current openings are for more experienced QA engineers, but we can certainly keep you updated on future opportunities. Thank you for reaching out!

data.summary: Customer complaint about incorrect order and lack of meat.
key_points: Incorrect food items received (korean noodles, salad with mayonnaise)
Requested refund or immediate delivery of correct order
data.final_answer: I apologize for the inconvenience. Please provide your order number so we can look into this immediately and resolve it promptly.

data.summary: Требуются сведения о технической документации и комиссиях для интеграции платежной системы.
key_points: Требуется информация об API и документации для разработчиков.
Нужна информация о комиссии для юридических лиц.
data.final_answer: Спасибо за обращение. Информация о технической документации и комиссиях будет предоставлена в ближайшее время.
